content.text:
[
  {
    "ruleId": "V-TELL-STRUCT",
    "pass": false,
    "severity": "advisory",
    "where": "doc, section 'What does a taste look like as numbers?'",
    "evidence": "'Before you read on, take a guess…' / 'Before you read on, call it.' / 'Before you scroll on, call one more reading'",
    "suggestion": "Vary the prompt openers so they don't repeat the near-identical 'Before you read on/scroll on' frame three times; e.g. change one to 'Call it first:' and another to 'One more before you move on:'"
  },
  {
    "ruleId": "V-RHYTHM",
    "pass": false,
    "severity": "advisory",
    "where": "page copy, 'What happens when you actually turn the probe?' and 'What did we just build?' sections",
    "evidence": "'Sit with that guess for a second' … 'the part worth sitting with' … 'Step back from the sweep for a second' … 'Sit with that on the way out'",
    "suggestion": "Thin the recurring 'sit with / for a second' motif; e.g. change one 'Sit with that guess for a second' to 'Lock in your guess'"
  }
]

content.text:
[
  {
    "ruleId": "V-DASH",
    "pass": false,
    "severity": "advisory",
    "where": "page copy, 'Double the arrow, double the number?' section",
    "evidence": "'The meter was never asked to measure size, it was supposed to measure agreement in direction, but size is riding along for free.'",
    "suggestion": "'The meter was never asked to measure size. It was supposed to measure agreement in direction, but size is riding along for free.'"
  },
  {
    "ruleId": "V-RHYTHM",
    "pass": false,
    "severity": "advisory",
    "where": "page copy, 'How do you turn \"same taste\"...' opening, adjacent paragraphs",
    "evidence": "'...how would you boil their match down to a single number?' followed immediately by 'Try answering that before you read on, because it's genuinely harder than it sounds.' (the phrase 'before you read on' repeats within two sentences)",
    "suggestion": "Drop the second 'before you read on': 'Try answering that first, because it's genuinely harder than it sounds.'"
  }
]
